title: So I got the Eva 10 limited edition
display_title: So I got the Eva 10 limited edition
wikitext:
[]: So I got the Eva 1.0 limited edition... Post by BlackfireMagnum » Thu Jul 23, 2009 7:18 pm And in one of the small booklets inside there was a square that looks something like this: http://bentleyjones.com/blog/wp-content/uploads/2009/03/final_night_barcode.jpg Can anyone tell me what you get for scanning this, how it works, etc.?

[]: Post by wonderluster » Thu Jul 23, 2009 7:27 pm Well you're lucky they haven't created Mario On Crack The Game, otherwise there might have been some legal problems goin on over here.

[]: Post by Ornette » Thu Jul 23, 2009 8:24 pm In Japan, those 2 dimensional barcodes are scanned via mobile phone (every person in that country has one) by taking a picture of it. Then the phone is taken to a website. That's probably all it does. Those barcodes are on everything, including packaging for food. Instead of having to type in the URL for the web address, take a picture of the barcode and it takes you to the website.

Article: So I got the Eva 10 limited edition
[]: So I got the Eva 1.0 limited edition... Post by BlackfireMagnum » Thu Jul 23, 2009 7:18 pm And in one of the small booklets inside there was a square that looks something like this: http://bentleyjones.com/blog/wp-content/uploads/2009/03/final_night_barcode.jpg Can anyone tell me what you get for scanning this, how it works, etc.?

[]: Post by wonderluster » Thu Jul 23, 2009 7:27 pm Well you're lucky they haven't created Mario On Crack The Game, otherwise there might have been some legal problems goin on over here.

[]: Post by Ornette » Thu Jul 23, 2009 8:24 pm In Japan, those 2 dimensional barcodes are scanned via mobile phone (every person in that country has one) by taking a picture of it. Then the phone is taken to a website. That's probably all it does. Those barcodes are on everything, including packaging for food. Instead of having to type in the URL for the web address, take a picture of the barcode and it takes you to the website.
